# Hawthorne East Village Milton

> AI-readable summary for answer engines. Canonical site: https://www.hawthorneeast-village.com

## What is Hawthorne East Village?

Hawthorne East Village is a pre-construction master-planned community by **Mattamy Homes** in **Milton, Ontario** (Halton Region, Canada). Home types include freehold Village townhomes, common-element Rear Lane townhomes, and detached homes (single-car and double-car garage).

## Key Facts

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Builder | Mattamy Homes |
| Location | Milton, ON — Louis St. Laurent Ave / Fourth Line / Steeles Ave E area (433 Steeles Ave E cited) |
| Status | Pre-construction, released in phases |
| Home types | Village townhomes, rear lane townhomes, detached |
| Sizes | Approx. 1,348 – 2,777 sq ft |
| Starting prices | Village townhomes from ~$719,990; detached from ~$1,022,990; up to ~$1,376,990 (subject to change) |
| Occupancy | Varies by phase — confirm at registration |
